settings.text: Simple pricing, no hidden fees. Every membership includes full facility access and group classes.

settings.title: Day Pass
settings.features:
+Full facility access
+All group classes
+Locker room & showers
-Personal training sessions
-Nutrition coaching

settings.title: Monthly
settings.features:
+Full facility access
+All group classes
+Locker room & showers
+1 personal training session
+Monthly progress check-in

settings.title: Annual
settings.features:
+Full facility access
+All group classes
+Locker room & showers
+2 personal training sessions/month
+Nutrition coaching included

settings.title: Full Equipment Access
settings.description: Free weights, machines, cardio, Olympic platforms, and functional training areas.

settings.title: Unlimited Classes
settings.description: Drop into any group class on the schedule at no extra cost.

settings.title: Member App
settings.description: Book classes, track workouts, and manage your membership from your phone.

settings.title: Free Parking
settings.description: Dedicated member parking right at the front door.

settings.question: How does the free trial work?
settings.answer: Your first session is completely free with no commitment. Just show up, train with us, and see if Olympic is the right fit. No credit card required.

settings.question: Can I cancel my membership anytime?
settings.answer: Monthly memberships can be cancelled with 30 days notice. No cancellation fees, no hassle. Annual memberships are billed upfront and are non-refundable after the first 30 days.

settings.question: Do I need to book classes in advance?
settings.answer: We recommend booking through the member app to guarantee your spot, especially for popular evening classes. Walk-ins are welcome if space is available.

settings.question: Is personal training included?
settings.answer: Monthly members receive one personal training session per month. Annual members get two sessions per month. Additional sessions can be purchased separately.

settings.question: Do you offer student or family discounts?
settings.answer: Yes. We offer a 15% student discount with valid ID and family plans for households of two or more. Contact us for details.

settings.title: Still have questions?
settings.text: Call us at (555) 738-0200 or drop by the gym. We are happy to show you around and answer anything in person.
